TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Terrell Brandon == Terrell Brandon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 5, Terrell Brandon, squliq na p'unro. Pawpuw qutux kawas ryax nya' gmnaw mari' sa sinmung gmnaw' mari' kya qu Terrell Brandon, cyugal gluw qu gnlgan nya'. Terrell Brandon hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnhan nya' sraral sa cikuy na' qu Terrell Brandon ga, min hayal na mqssuqi' mhkangi' ru yaqih cikay kakay niya'. Terrell Brandon hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. minqwas biru' squ pqwasan biru' tay Grant High qu Terrell Brandon qaniy (kocyuw na kranto). rasun na Terrell Brandon rantay naha' musa' sangka' mspung mzzingat qnabu' na tmucing mari' kya pqwasan biru' sa kawas tay 1988. portland hya qu wal mgportland, hya' qu tqsu' balay wal mshriq sa pqwasan biru' na sinsyuw. pinqwasan nya' biru' Terrell Brandon hya ga minqwas biru' squ gaku' kya Oregon (tay gak Oregong). Rasun ni Terrell Brandon qu gluw naha' musa' sangka' sapspngan na kok ka' sa kawas 1989-1990. pincyuwagan nya' pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Terrell Brandon pinxalan nya' magal tisu' (13). pinxalan nya' zmingat mari' sa minxal mspung ga (2). pinxalan nya' zmingat mari' ga (8). kawas tay 1990 ga wal galan musaq' mspung sa gluw na MVP. Cleveland Cavaliers (kawas tay 1991–1997) kawas tay 1991, galan tay 11 lpgan sisyuw na Cleveland Cavaliers qu Terrell Brandonqaniy. Terrell Brandon hya' ga psru' mari' tay suruw, galan paysyugan ni Mark Price. kawaS tay 1997, "Sinbung na undoo"wal naha Syan lalu' maha "pzyang baq balay maras mari tay suruw na NBA". kawa tay 1997 ga rnaw nya musa' kogik ru zmingat mari qu sgIaing nya musa' mspung. kawa tay 1997, wal rnagai tayyok sesing syoo na NBA tayyok sesingsyo. Milwaukee Bucks qani ga (aring kawas tay 1997–1999) 9 byacing tay kawas tay 1997, Cleveland Cavaliers (gluw na kriflan wal naha sPtbaziy tay Milwaukee Bucks Terrell Brandon squ Milwaukee Bucks. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Terrell Brandon
S.PHON: == terrell βran*on == terrell βran*on s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, terrell βran*on, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pawpuw qutux kawas~ɕ rjax njaʔ ɣmnaw mariʔ s~ɕa s~ɕinmuŋ ɣmnawʔ mariʔ kja qu terrell βran*on, ʦ~ʨjuɣal ɣluw qu ɣnlɣan njaʔ. terrell βran*on ħja ɣa wal malax s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnaw mari na amirika. qnħan njaʔ s~ɕraral s~ɕa ʦ~ʨikuj naʔ qu terrell βran*on ɣa, min ħajal na mqs~ɕs~ɕuqiʔ mħkaŋiʔ ru jaqiħ ʦ~ʨikaj kakaj nijaʔ. terrell βran*on ħja ɣa wal malax s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnaw mari na amirika. minqwas~ɕ βiruʔ s~ɕqu pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ taj ɣrant ħiɣħ qu terrell βran*on qanij (koʦ~ʨjuw na kranto). ras~ɕun na terrell βran*on rantaj naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕaŋkaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ mzziŋat qnaβuʔ na tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mariʔ kja pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****. portlan* ħja qu wal mɣportlan*, ħjaʔ qu tqs~ɕuʔ βalaj wal ms~ɕħriq s~ɕa pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw. pinqwas~ɕan njaʔ βiruʔ terrell βran*on ħja ɣa minqwas~ɕ βiruʔ s~ɕqu ɣakuʔ kja oreɣon (taj ɣak oreɣoŋ). ras~ɕun ni terrell βran*on qu ɣluw naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕaŋkaʔ s~ɕaps~ɕpŋan na kok kaʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****-****. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ pzjux qu wajal nijaʔ kirok ni terrell βran*on pinxalan njaʔ maɣal tis~ɕuʔ (**). pinxalan njaʔ zmiŋat mariʔ s~ɕa minxal ms~ɕpuŋ ɣa (*). pinxalan njaʔ zmiŋat mariʔ ɣa (*). kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣa wal ɣalan mus~ɕaqʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa ɣluw na m*p. ʦ~ʨle*elan* ʦ~ʨa*aliers~ɕ (kawas~ɕ taj *********) kawas~ɕ taj ****, ɣalan taj ** lpɣan s~ɕis~ɕjuw na ʦ~ʨle*elan* ʦ~ʨa*aliers~ɕ qu terrell βran*onqanij. terrell βran*on ħjaʔ ɣa ps~ɕruʔ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw, ɣalan pajs~ɕjuɣan ni mark priʦ~ʨe. kawas~ɕ taj ****, "s~ɕinβuŋ na un*oo"wal naħa s~ɕjan laluʔ maħa "pzjaŋ βaq βalaj maras~ɕ mari taj s~ɕuruw na nβa". kawa taj **** ɣa rnaw nja mus~ɕaʔ koɣik ru zmiŋat mari qu s~ɕɣiaiŋ nja mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ. kawa taj ****, wal rnaɣai tajjok s~ɕes~ɕiŋ s~ɕjoo na nβa tajjok s~ɕes~ɕiŋs~ɕjo. milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ qani ɣa (ariŋ kawas~ɕ taj *********) * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj kawas~ɕ taj ****, ʦ~ʨle*elan* ʦ~ʨa*aliers~ɕ (ɣluw na kri*lan wal naħa s~ɕptβazij taj milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ terrell βran*on s~ɕqu milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ terrell βran*on
S.FORM: == Terrell Brandon == Terrell Brandon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 5, Terrell Brandon, squliq na p'unro. Pawpuw qutux kawas ryax nya' gmnaw mari' sa sinmung gmnaw' mari' kya qu Terrell Brandon, cyugal gluw qu gnlgan nya'. Terrell Brandon hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnhan nya' sraral sa cikuy na' qu Terrell Brandon ga, min hayal na mqssuqi' mhkangi' ru yaqih cikay kakay niya'. Terrell Brandon hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. minqwas biru' squ pqwasan biru' tay Grant High qu Terrell Brandon qaniy (kocyuw na kranto). rasun na Terrell Brandon rantay naha' musa' sangka' mspung mzzingat qnabu' na tmucing mari' kya pqwasan biru' sa kawas tay 1988. portland hya qu wal mgportland, hya' qu tqsu' balay wal mshriq sa pqwasan biru' na sinsyuw. pinqwasan nya' biru' Terrell Brandon hya ga minqwas biru' squ gaku' kya Oregon (tay gak Oregong). Rasun ni Terrell Brandon qu gluw naha' musa' sangka' sapspngan na kok ka' sa kawas 1989-1990. pincyuwagan nya' pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Terrell Brandon pinxalan nya' magal tisu' (13). pinxalan nya' zmingat mari' sa minxal mspung ga (2). pinxalan nya' zmingat mari' ga (8). kawas tay 1990 ga wal galan musaq' mspung sa gluw na MVP. Cleveland Cavaliers (kawas tay 1991–1997) kawas tay 1991, galan tay 11 lpgan sisyuw na Cleveland Cavaliers qu Terrell Brandonqaniy. Terrell Brandon hya' ga psru' mari' tay suruw, galan paysyugan ni Mark Price. kawaS tay 1997, "Sinbung na undoo"wal naha Syan lalu' maha "pzyang baq balay maras mari tay suruw na NBA". kawa tay 1997 ga rnaw nya musa' kogik ru zmingat mari qu sgIaing nya musa' mspung. kawa tay 1997, wal rnagai tayyok sesing syoo na NBA tayyok sesingsyo. Milwaukee Bucks qani ga (aring kawas tay 1997–1999) 9 byacing tay kawas tay 1997, Cleveland Cavaliers (gluw na kriflan wal naha sPtbaziy tay Milwaukee Bucks Terrell Brandon squ Milwaukee Bucks. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Terrell Brandon
S.PHON: == terrell βran*on == terrell βran*on s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, terrell βran*on, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pawpuw qutux kawas~ɕ rjax njaʔ ɣmnaw mariʔ s~ɕa s~ɕinmuŋ ɣmnawʔ mariʔ kja qu terrell βran*on, ʦ~ʨjuɣal ɣluw qu ɣnlɣan njaʔ. terrell βran*on ħja ɣa wal malax s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnaw mari na amirika. qnħan njaʔ s~ɕraral s~ɕa ʦ~ʨikuj naʔ qu terrell βran*on ɣa, min ħajal na mqs~ɕs~ɕuqiʔ mħkaŋiʔ ru jaqiħ ʦ~ʨikaj kakaj nijaʔ. terrell βran*on ħja ɣa wal malax s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnaw mari na amirika. minqwas~ɕ βiruʔ s~ɕqu pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ taj ɣrant ħiɣħ qu terrell βran*on qanij (koʦ~ʨjuw na kranto). ras~ɕun na terrell βran*on rantaj naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕaŋkaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ mzziŋat qnaβuʔ na tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mariʔ kja pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****. portlan* ħja qu wal mɣportlan*, ħjaʔ qu tqs~ɕuʔ βalaj wal ms~ɕħriq s~ɕa pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw. pinqwas~ɕan njaʔ βiruʔ terrell βran*on ħja ɣa minqwas~ɕ βiruʔ s~ɕqu ɣakuʔ kja oreɣon (taj ɣak oreɣoŋ). ras~ɕun ni terrell βran*on qu ɣluw naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕaŋkaʔ s~ɕaps~ɕpŋan na kok kaʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****-****. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ pzjux qu wajal nijaʔ kirok ni terrell βran*on pinxalan njaʔ maɣal tis~ɕuʔ (**). pinxalan njaʔ zmiŋat mariʔ s~ɕa minxal ms~ɕpuŋ ɣa (*). pinxalan njaʔ zmiŋat mariʔ ɣa (*). kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣa wal ɣalan mus~ɕaqʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa ɣluw na m*p. ʦ~ʨle*elan* ʦ~ʨa*aliers~ɕ (kawas~ɕ taj *********) kawas~ɕ taj ****, ɣalan taj ** lpɣan s~ɕis~ɕjuw na ʦ~ʨle*elan* ʦ~ʨa*aliers~ɕ qu terrell βran*onqanij. terrell βran*on ħjaʔ ɣa ps~ɕruʔ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw, ɣalan pajs~ɕjuɣan ni mark priʦ~ʨe. kawas~ɕ taj ****, "s~ɕinβuŋ na un*oo"wal naħa s~ɕjan laluʔ maħa "pzjaŋ βaq βalaj maras~ɕ mari taj s~ɕuruw na nβa". kawa taj **** ɣa rnaw nja mus~ɕaʔ koɣik ru zmiŋat mari qu s~ɕɣiaiŋ nja mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ. kawa taj ****, wal rnaɣai tajjok s~ɕes~ɕiŋ s~ɕjoo na nβa tajjok s~ɕes~ɕiŋs~ɕjo. milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ qani ɣa (ariŋ kawas~ɕ taj *********) * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj kawas~ɕ taj ****, ʦ~ʨle*elan* ʦ~ʨa*aliers~ɕ (ɣluw na kri*lan wal naħa s~ɕptβazij taj milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ terrell βran*on s~ɕqu milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ terrell βran*on
